item.title: Elliot on Demand — Tue Jun 06 2023
item.description: • EITM: Cringe Watch 6/6/23 — From afar!

item.title: Elliot on Demand — Mon Jun 05 2023

item.title: Elliot on Demand — Fri Jun 02 2023
item.description: • EITM: Co(ping)-Champions 6/2/23 — Other than the actual Scripps Cup winner, was anyone happy with this year's Spelling Bee?

item.title: Elliot on Demand — Thu Jun 01 2023
item.description: • EITM: Spelling Bee Fantasy Draft 6/1/23 — Who will take home the S̷c̷r̷i̷p̷p̷s̷ ̷C̷u̷p̷ victory for EITM?!

item.title: Elliot on Demand — Wed May 31 2023
item.description: • EITM: Condom For A Funeral 5/31/23 — Love lives (not) breeding. • EITM: A-Rod For ARESTIN 5/31/23 — Cover your bases!
